text: >> Hello? Hi, this is Chelsea and I'm reaching out because we pulled up your Medicare profile and there's a note here showing your 2026 plan update hasn't been confirmed yet. We just need a quick confirmation from you so your coverage doesn't get interrupted. Just confirm for me, do you have both Part A and Part B? So you do have Part A and B of Medicare, right?
